name: Product page works correctly regardless of delivery options
scenarioId: delivery_options:Product page works correctly regardless of delivery options
methodName: Product page works correctly regardless of delivery options

testSteps.description: Given the shopper has navigated to a product detail page

children.description: Shopper opens the browser at http://localhost:3001

testSteps.description: Then the product detail page should still be functional without delivery options

userStory.narrative:
As an online shopper on Linea Supply
  I want to choose a delivery option for a product
  So that I can select the shipping method that suits me

title: Product page works correctly regardless of delivery options
